testsuite.name: com.ynabauto.domain.AmazonOrderEntityTest

testcase.name: can save and retrieve an AmazonOrder()
can update status from PENDING to MATCHED and set ynabTransactionId()
can transition order through full lifecycle to COMPLETED()

testsuite.system-out:
07:00:55.307 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ynabauto.domain.AmazonOrderEntityTest]: AmazonOrderEntityTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 07:00:55.501 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ynabauto.Application for test class com.ynabauto.domain.AmazonOrderEntityTest
